summary: Semi-aquatic apex predator with distinctive dorsal sail. InGen assets tagged for restricted containment due to territorial range and aggression index.
facts: Elongated skull and conical teeth suited for catching fish.
Dorsal neural spines form a sail — thermoregulation and display role debated.
Strong swimmer; do not assume land-bound movement patterns.
Recovered embryo flagged for enhanced tracking protocols.
fieldNotes: Avoid waterline approaches. Specimen may claim territory across river systems.
